message:
refactor(connectors): improve AI connector test coverage + remove dead code

Anthropic connector improvements:
- Increase cost tracking precision from 6 to 9 decimal places
  (1e6 -> 1e9 fixed-point multiplier) for sub-millicent accuracy
  on high-volume usage patterns
- Add comprehensive test helper generate_valid_token() using
  Ed25519SigningKey and CapabilityTokenBuilder
- Update test_handshake to use FCP2-compliant handshake parameters:
  protocol_version, zone, host_public_key, nonce, capabilities_requested
- Update test_invoke_without_config to properly handshake first and
  include valid capability tokens - tests now verify the actual
  capability verification flow
- Improve test_invoke_with_config to exercise full V2 auth flow

Anthropic error cleanup:
- Remove unused error variants that were never constructed:
  - BudgetExceeded: Budget enforcement moved to policy layer
  - NotConfigured: Now uses FcpError::NotConfigured directly
  - Stream: Streaming errors handled via External error type
- Simplify is_retryable() by removing Stream case

OpenAI connector improvements:
- Same test coverage improvements as Anthropic connector
- Proper capability token generation and verification in tests
- FCP2-compliant handshake parameter usage

OpenAI error cleanup:
- Remove unused NotConfigured variant (uses FcpError::NotConfigured)

These changes ensure connector tests exercise the actual FCP2 protocol
flow rather than testing deprecated V1 code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
